prose: The frontier molecular orbitals task on furan was run using DFT with the B3LYP functional and the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The calculation converged successfully in 9 SCF cycles. The HOMO (highest occupied molecular orbital) energy is approximately -6.36 eV, and the LUMO (lowest unoccupied molecular orbital) energy is approximately -0.10 eV. The HOMO-LUMO gap is about 6.26 eV. The method used for this calculation is B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier 'standard') in PySCF.
